description.value: > Cooperation You know that you and your allies are strongest when you work together toward a common goal. Associated Domain: Community. Replacement Power: The following granted power replaces the calming touch ability of the Community domain. Synergistic Touch (Sp) You can touch a creature as a standard action to confer upon it the benefits of any one Teamwork feat that you possess. This effect persists for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum 1). You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier.
